# sevalla_application_environment_variable (Resource)

Manages an environment variable for a Sevalla application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Available at both runtime and build time (defaults)
resource "sevalla_application_environment_variable" "example" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
  key            = "DATABASE_URL"
  value          = "postgres://user:pass@host:5432/db"
}

# Build-time only variable
resource "sevalla_application_environment_variable" "build_only" {
  application_id = sevalla_application.example.id
  key            = "NPM_TOKEN"
  value          = var.npm_token
  is_runtime     = false
  is_buildtime   = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_id` (String) The ID of the application this environment variable belongs to.
- `key` (String) The environment variable key.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The environment variable value.

### Optional

- `is_buildtime` (Boolean) Whether the environment variable is available at build time.
- `is_runtime` (Boolean) Whether the environment variable is available at runtime.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the environment variable was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the environment variable.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the environment variable was last updated.
